queries.question: List the universities offering courses and the corresponding platforms in alphabetical order of university and platform.
queries.sql: SELECT PlatformName, University FROM Platforms ORDER BY PlatformName, University ASC
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?platformname ?university WHERE {
  ?platforms a :Platforms .
  ?platforms p:PlatformName ?platformname .
  ?platforms p:University ?university .
  ?platforms p:PlatformName ?platformname_o .
  ?platforms p:University ?university_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?platformname_o) ASC(?university_o)

queries.question: Show me universities where id is odd
queries.sql: SELECT University FROM Platforms WHERE PlatformID % 2 = 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?u WHERE { ?x a :Platforms ; p:University ?u ; p:PlatformID ?id . BIND(xsd:integer(?id) AS ?i) FILTER(?i - 2*FLOOR(?i/2) = 1) }

queries.question: List the universities offering courses in alphabetical order of university.
queries.sql: SELECT University FROM Platforms ORDER BY University ASC
queries.sparql:

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?university WHERE {
  ?platforms a :Platforms .
  ?platforms p:University ?university .
  ?platforms p:University ?university_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?university_o)

queries.question: List the course platforms in alphabetical order.
queries.sql: SELECT PlatformName FROM Platforms ORDER BY PlatformName ASC
queries.sparql:

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?platformname WHERE {
  ?platforms a :Platforms .
  ?platforms p:PlatformName ?platformname .
  ?platforms p:PlatformName ?platformname_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?platformname_o)
